title: Zed + Gemma-4 12B & Qwen-3.6: HOW IS THIS POSSIBLE?! THIS IS CRAZY!
summary: Zed code editor now supports local AI model providers including LM Studio, Ollama, and llama.cpp for running coding assistants directly on users' machines. This enables offline code assistance features like explanation, refactoring, and boilerplate generation while maintaining code privacy without relying on cloud APIs.
